response.justification: The candidate has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Experienced in AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven track record in building scalable cloud systems (AWS, Kubernetes, microservices)
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentorship through workshops and tools
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in resume
AI/ML experience appears incidental rather than core to 8+ years of professional work
Lacks demonstrable customer-facing technical leadership in enterprise GenAI deployments
